reviews.comment:
Siempre te atienden rápido, casi sin esperas. Los precios del combustible son iguales a todas las ypf de la zona.  No conozco si tiene Full, creo que no.

(Translated by Google)
They always serve you quickly, with almost no waiting time. Fuel prices are the same as all YPF stores in the area. I don't know if they have Full Service, but I don't think so.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJZ1BiVWdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy cálida atención del playero. Paciente porque quería pagar con la APP pero tardó en abrir en mí teléfono... Todo correcto.

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly service from the beach attendant. I was patient because I wanted to pay with the app, but it took a while to open on my phone... Everything was fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJX0pYMTBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La onda que tienen los chicos que atienden, es genial. Súper atentos y respetuosos.
Los sanitarios, muy limpios.
El shop, medio picante ...

(Translated by Google)
The staff are great. Super attentive and respectful.
The restrooms are very clean.
The shop is a bit spicy...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3eWZTaXJ3RRAB
